type_definitions.name: TypeCatalogueDocument
type_definitions.description: Document structure holding type catalogue entries and signals — first argument of check_type_signals; guard against accidental domain modification during signature change (T001)

type_definitions.name: TypeGraph
type_definitions.description: Pre-indexed view of a crate public API for type catalogue evaluation — consumed by render_type_graph_* / write_type_graph_dir in infrastructure layer (T003/T004/T005); guard against accidental modification
